rationale: Trump's announcement of a Sunday Iran deal signing is a major qualitative shift in US foreign policy with direct implications for oil prices, Middle East stability, and US military posture — highly relevant to American residents.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday, Trump says
top_events.summary: A signed nuclear/sanctions deal with Iran would be a landmark US foreign policy event, potentially lowering oil prices and reducing Middle East military risk for US forces — but contradicted by Iranian officials, adding uncertainty.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms a US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua leader, escalating the administration's use of military force against foreign criminal organizations operating in the US.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal AI security restrictions continue as active policy; ongoing limitation on AI tool access for certain users signals sustained government intervention in the AI sector.
